name: Rapunzel

abilities.rulesText: While you have a character named Pascal in play, this character gains Ward.

subtitle: Appreciative Artist
rulesText: PERCEPTIVE PARTNER While you have a character named Pascal in play, this character gains Ward. (Opponents can’t choose them except to challenge.)
flavorText: "Pascal! A new flower for the wall!"

name: Donald Duck

abilities.rulesText: When you play this character, if you used Shift to play him, each opponent loses 2 lore.
While an opponent has 10 or more lore, this character gets +6 {S}.

subtitle: Pie Slinger
rulesText:
HUMBLE PIE When you play this character, if you used Shift to play him, each opponent loses 2 lore.
RAGING DUCK While an opponent has 10 or more lore, this character gets +6 {S}.

name: Stitch

abilities.rulesText: Whenever you play a character with cost 2 or less, you may exert them to draw a card.

subtitle: Rock Star
rulesText: ADORING FANS Whenever you play a character with cost 2 or less, you may exert them to draw a card.
flavorText: The best part about a beachside concert is that there's always room for one more.
